description: As a wildfire analyst, map fire damage in a recently burned area using ESA SNAP Desktop. Using the source file at ~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (Band 1: SWIR1, Band 2: NIR, Band 3: Red, Band 4: Green), generate a new band named 'NBR' using the formula (band_2 - band_1) / (band_2 + band_1) and a Valid-Pixel Expression of band_2 > 0.05. Additionally, create a 'burn_severity' band classified as: Class 2 (High Severity) for NBR < 0.0; Class 1 (Moderate Severity) for NBR between 0.0 and 0.25; and Class 0 (Unburned/Regrowth) for NBR > 0.25. Save the final product containing all bands to ~/snap_exports/burn_analysis.dim in BEAM-DIMAP format and export it to ~/snap_exports/burn_analysis.hdr in ENVI format.
